chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-827 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 13-05-2025 None present for the petitioners. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
